RECRUITMENT BARRACKS
Basic Infantry — $1,800
Cheap basic riflemen. +10 soldiers. The foundation of any army.
Marines — $3,150
Specialize in amphibious assaults. +5 Marines
Scout Soldiers — $3,250
Good at reconnaissance. +5 Scouts
Snipers — $4,300
Excellent long-range anti-infantry. +5 Snipers
Elite Spec Ops — $5,300
Stealth and sabotage experts. +5 Spec Ops
Mechanic — $12,000
Vital to any military. 2+ Mechanics = 20% cheaper repairs on all vehicles & aircraft.
Navy Crewman — $8,500
Essential to operate naval vessels. +1 Navy Crewman. Required for ships.
Pilot — $14,500
Highly trained. Required to operate any aircraft. +1 Pilot. Pilots are expensive and vital.
Inspector — $25,000
Hire a vehicle inspector to check your fleet. Gives better chance vehicles take less damage in battle.
Miner — $9,500
Extracts minerals over time. More = better hauls. Extract for cash. (8 min delivery)
STORE — VEHICLES, AIRCRAFT, NAVAL & FACILITIES
Sort by price: (Sorts currently visible items in this tab)

Ground Vehicles

Armoured Vehicle — $125,000
Provides mobility and protection for infantry.
Tank — $285,000
Heavy armor. Excellent against enemy vehicles and fortifications.
Scout Vehicle — $85,000
Fast recon vehicle. Great for spotting enemy movements.
Armoured Carrier — $165,000
Transports infantry safely. Solid all-rounder vehicle.
Patrol Vehicle — $95,000
Quick response vehicle for patrols and light combat support.
General Tank — $310,000
Advanced tank variant. Stronger than standard Tank.
Scout Combat Vehicle — $145,000
Combat recon. Fast and packs a punch against soft targets.
Heavy Assault Tank — $400,000
Very powerful. Extreme armor & firepower. High cost, high impact.
Troop Transport Jeep — $75,000
No guns but decent armour. Safe infantry transport.
Buggy — $65,000
Weak scout + minigun. Great vs infantry, poor vs armor. Excellent recon.
Buggy — $65,000
Very weak vs heavy armour but excellent scouting. +12 vs infantry.
Armoured Troop Transport — $75,000
No guns but decent armour. Safe infantry transport.

Aircraft

Fighter Plane — $245,000
Close air support fighter. Strong against ground targets.
Cargo Plane — $380,000
Heavy transport aircraft. Enables rapid deployment.
Attack Chopper — $395,000
Attack helicopter. Devastating close air support and anti-armor.
Transport Helicopter — $265,000
Heavy transport helicopter. Rapid troop and supply deployment.
Fighter Jet — $680,000
Advanced multirole fighter jet. Air superiority and precision strikes.
Bomber Plane — $520,000
Strategic bomber. Strong vs vehicles & buildings. +10 effective vs vehicles.

Naval Units

Destroyer Ship — $520,000
Multi-role destroyer. Strong anti-air and anti-ship capabilities.
Submarine — $780,000
Stealthy attack submarine. Excellent for covert operations.
Patrol Boat — $195,000
Fast patrol boat. Excellent for coastal defense and light naval operations.

Facilities

Barracks — $165,000
Increases recruitment capacity and efficiency. +20 soldier unit cap per Barracks bought.
Medical Centre — $320,000
Reduces soldier losses in combat and improves recovery.
Air Force Base — $450,000
Reduces aircraft prices by 25%. Allows +2 aircraft per one bought. Unlocks better air operations.
Hanger — $150,000
Reduces aircraft prices by 15%. Improves air operations and maintenance.
Vehicle Depot — $125,000
Reduces vehicle prices by 10%. Allows +4 vehicles storage/ready per Depot bought. Better vehicle management and repair rates.
Base Defence Turret — $950,000
Boosts base defence. Greatly improves survival odds and reduces losses in raids/attacks.
Reactor — $500,000
High-output nuclear power plant. Rare parts may make it unavailable some days. 7 day build time.

Special Weapons

Missile Launcher — $680,000
Excellent long-range anti-vehicle and anti-fortification support.
Advanced Firearms (10 Rifles) — $95,000
Buy 10 rifles. +0.5 Strength. Greatly improves combat effectiveness.
Old Anti-Aircraft Gun — $175,000
+15 vs air attacks. Tends to misfire. Good budget AA.
The Catalyst (Advanced AA) — $680,000
Mega advanced AA. +45 vs aircraft. Extremely effective air defence.

Weapons — Handheld & Support

Owning these improves combat effectiveness (especially when you have matching unit types like Snipers). Also restores ammo.

Shotgun (10x Bundle) — $85,000
High close-range damage. Great vs infantry in buildings. +7 Strength when owned (batch of 10).
Sniper Rifle (10x Bundle) — $145,000
Long range precision. Massive bonus when you have Snipers (+8 effective strength in battle per batch).
Assault Rifle (10x Bundle) — $92,000
Balanced damage & rate of fire. Good all-rounder for Marines & Spec Ops. +7 Strength per batch.
RPG Launcher (10x Bundle) — $185,000
Anti-vehicle & anti-fortification. Excellent vs Tanks & buildings. +7 Strength vs vehicles per batch.
Pistol (10x Bundle) — $42,000
Sidearm for officers & Spec Ops. Small but reliable bonus. +7 Strength per batch.
Grenade (10x Bundle) — $65,000
Area damage. Strong vs clustered infantry. +7 Strength per batch.
Ammo Crate (10x - 1000 rounds total) — $55,000
Restores 1000 ammo total. Essential to keep fighting. +7 Strength equivalent value.
50.CAL Machine Gun — $125,000
+5 vs Aircraft, +20 vs Infantry. Devastating support weapon.
Defensive Land Mines — $145,000
+15% Defence vs vehicles & infantry. Great for protecting your base.
MY ARMY — CURRENT FORCES
Train Infantry
Allocate funds to improve infantry tactics & morale. Higher investment = bigger Strength gain.

Amount: $
Train Vehicles
Invest in crew training, maintenance & vehicle tactics. Higher investment = bigger Strength gain.

Amount: $

Training costs money + 1 turn. Strength improves battle odds significantly. Vehicles & units boost effective Strength too.

MY STATS — COMBAT PROFILE

Attack/Defense calculated from your forces, buildings & strength. Win rate updates after battles.

RESOURCES — REFINERY & PROTECTION

Refinery Investment

Invest money into oil/mineral refining operations. Costs 1 Turn per investment. Returns a small but permanent increase to your daily income.

Military Protection Contracts

Pay for local militias and security contracts. Costs 1 Turn per investment. Provides small daily income boost + minor defensive bonuses.

Mining Operations

Deploy your Miners to extract valuable minerals. The more Miners you own, the better the hauls and rarer finds. Extract to sell for instant cash.

Miners Owned: 0
Recruit more Miners in the Recruit tab (8 min delivery each).
Minerals Found:
No minerals extracted yet. Deploy miners to start!

Higher miner count = chance at rare minerals (Gold, Uranium, Diamonds) worth more $.

These investments give small but permanent daily income increases. Higher investment = better returns.

Global Stock Market

Invest in volatile military-industrial stocks. Prices fluctuate daily (and on market refresh). Buy low, sell high to profit — or lose money on bad trades. Uses 1 Turn per buy/sell or refresh.

Stocks change value every day automatically + on refresh. High risk, high reward.

YOUR TERRITORIES
COMMUNICATIONS & MESSAGES
AI FACTION DIPLOMACY — SEND ALLY REQUESTS

Build alliances with AI factions. Send a request — they may accept or deny based on chance. Once allied, you can trade resources with them.

LEADERBOARDS
AVAILABLE MISSIONS
RAID OPERATIONS

Launch quick raids to steal resources from nearby enemies. Choose your target wisely — stronger rivals yield bigger rewards but higher risk.

RAID COOLDOWN: 14 IN-GAME DAYS
Check status in Raid tab • 1 raid allowed every 14 real-world minutes (construction/delivery time)

Extra raid tokens allow additional raids beyond daily turn limits. Very expensive but powerful.

POSSIBLE RAID TARGETS

Click any target above or use the main button for a random rival raid. Costs 8 turns. High risk, high reward. Stronger targets = bigger loot but tougher fight.
